title: Collapitalcraft
description: Focused on collection and capital, this industrious modpack adds tons of machines for you to tinker and create with, immersive additions for SMP-style multi-player, and much, much more.
body:
Nuclear reactors and massive mechanical contraptions, collectible cards and quests, war planes and pirate ships, crab cakes and buffalo cheese. The sky's within the limit in Collapitalcraft.

Collapitalcraft focuses on collection and capital, as well as providing a set of challenges for players to complete beyond Vanilla Minecraft in a multi-player compatible and player-friendly environment.

This modpack aims to first improve the Vanilla Minecraft experience with UI, performance, and QoL changes, then extend it with various content a quest system (WIP) to guide the player. It also adds some just-plain-fun elements that can be used for SMP/RP scenarios, good for multi-player servers with your friends or playing alone.

The quests aim to encourage the player to explore various mods and provide end-game difficulty quests to grind once you think you've done it all. While these quests are a work in progress, there are already plenty for you to complete.

Users are encouraged to install their own shader pack(s) of choice. For those who don't already have a preferrence, the developer recommends you check out [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound).

## Disclaimers
### Content Warning
This modpack contains various alcohol-related functions including wine making, beer brewing, and mixed drink creation. Some content may not be suitable for all audiences.
### Bugs/Glitches/Issues
Please report bugs/glitches/issues you experience with this modpack to the [Collapitalcraft issue tracker](https://github.com/CollapitalDev/Collapitalcraft/issues) so I can improve this modpack. Please do not report bugs/glitches to the developers of individual mods or shader packs unless they encourage you to do otherwise.
### Funding
This modpack is a passion project without any monetary expenses, and thus does not currently require funding. In lieu of donations to the project, I encourage you to donate to one of the developers of a mod in this modpack. The following list is non-exhaustive:
- Ad Astra: [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/terrariumearth)
- Aquaculture: [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/profile?u=82105)
- Architectury API: [Patreon](https://patreon.com/shedaniel)
- Collective: [Patreon](https://patreon.com/serilum)
- Cracker's Wither Storm Mod: [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/user?u=87070090)
- Create: [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/simibubi)
- Distant Horizons: [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/distanthorizons)
- Embeddium/ModernFix: [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/embeddedt)
- FancyMenu: [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/keksuccino)
- Hardcore Questing Mode: [PayPal](https://paypal.me/lorddusk)
- Industrial Foregoing: [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/buuz135)
- Jade: [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/snownee)
- Just Enough Items: [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/mezz)
- Mekanism: [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/thiakil)
- Oculus: [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/asek3)
- Thermal Series: [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/kinglemming)
- Tinkers' Construct: [mDiyo's Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/mDiyo) & [KnightMiner's Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/KnightMiner)
